goal: Compare the standard individual paid 'Pro' tier monthly price (billed monthly, USD) of three AI coding assistants — GitHub Copilot Pro, Cursor Pro, and Windsurf Pro — and determine which is the cheapest and its price.
expected: GitHub Copilot Pro is the cheapest at $10/month, half the price of both Cursor Pro ($20/month) and Windsurf Pro ($20/month, which are tied), as of 2026-06-18.
answer:
## AI Coding Assistant Pro Tier Pricing Comparison (Monthly, Billed Monthly, USD)

| Tool | Plan Name | Monthly Price (billed monthly) |
|---|---|---|
| **GitHub Copilot** | Pro | **$10 / month** |
| **Cursor** | Pro | $20 / month |
| **Windsurf** | Pro | $20 / month |

### 🏆 Cheapest: GitHub Copilot Pro at **$10/month**

**GitHub Copilot Pro** is the clear winner at **$10/user/month** (billed monthly) [1] — exactly **half the price** of both Cursor Pro and Windsurf Pro, which are each priced at **$20/month** [2][3].

---

### Plan Highlights
- **GitHub Copilot Pro – $10/mo** [1]: Unlimited code completions & next-edit suggestions, model selection, access to Claude Code & Codex agents, code review, and $15/month in credits.
- **Cursor Pro – $20/mo** [2]: Extended Agent limits, access to frontier AI models, MCPs, skills, and hooks (everything in the free Hobby tier, plus more).
- **Windsurf Pro – $20/mo** [3]: Paid individual tier above the free plan, with expanded usage and model access.
